name: Howlers Genesis Partner Badge
description: The mark of those who entered early. This Soulbound badge represents your place within the Howlers ecosystem — a permanent identity layer tied to loyalty, access, and future utility across Uni-Fy. Not a tradable asset. Not a temporary reward. A signal. Holders gain recognition through: Loyalty tracking, Leader boards, Gated access, Evolving community systems. The badge is intentionally incomplete — a reflection of a world still forming.
